languages.text: {n}Эоганн хмурится, закрывает свой органический глаз и какое-то время висит в глубокой думе.{/n} "Я... переосмыслил ситуацию. Меня гложут сомнения, и я не уверен до конца, что поступаю верно. Но я доверюсь вам. Это мое финальное решение".

{n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн хмурится, закрывает свой органический глаз и какое-то время висит в глубокой думе.{/n} "Я... переосмыслил ситуацию. Меня гложут сомнения, и я не уверен до конца, что поступаю верно. Но я доверюсь вам. Это мое финальное решение".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

{n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

{n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn frunce el ceño, cierra su ojo orgánico y cavila profundamente durante un rato.{/n} «He... reconsiderado la situación. Me asaltan las dudas, y no tengo del todo claro que esté haciendo lo correcto. Pero confío en usted. Mi decisión es final».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn frunce el ceño, cierra su ojo orgánico y cavila profundamente durante un rato.{/n} «He... reconsiderado la situación. Me asaltan las dudas, y no tengo del todo claro que esté haciendo lo correcto. Pero confío en usted. Mi decisión es final».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡皱起眉头，闭上那只有机肉眼，沉思了片刻。{/n}“我……重新评估了情况。我心里有疑虑，也不确定自己做得对不对。但我选择相信您。这是我的最终决定。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡皱起眉头，闭上那只有机肉眼，沉思了片刻。{/n}“我……重新评估了情况。我心里有疑虑，也不确定自己做得对不对。但我选择相信您。这是我的最终决定。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn fronce les sourcils, ferme son œil organique et se plonge dans ses pensées pendant un long moment.{/n} « J'ai... réévalué la situation. Le doute m'assaille et m'empêche de savoir s'il s'agit bien de la meilleure chose à faire, mais je vous accorde ma confiance. Je ne reviendrai pas sur cette décision. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn fronce les sourcils, ferme son œil organique et se plonge dans ses pensées pendant un long moment.{/n} « J'ai... réévalué la situation. Le doute m'assaille et m'empêche de savoir s'il s'agit bien de la meilleure chose à faire, mais je vous accorde ma confiance. Je ne reviendrai pas sur cette décision. »

languages.text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan Eogunn, organik gözünü kapatıyor ve bir süre derin düşüncelere dalıyor.{/n} "Ben... Durumu yeniden değerlendirdim. Şüphelerle boğuşuyorum ve doğru olanı yaptığımdan bütünüyle emin değilim. Fakat size güveneceğim. Son kararım budur."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan Eogunn, organik gözünü kapatıyor ve bir süre derin düşüncelere dalıyor.{/n} "Ben... Durumu yeniden değerlendirdim. Şüphelerle boğuşuyorum ve doğru olanı yaptığımdan bütünüyle emin değilim. Fakat size güveneceğim. Son kararım budur."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn runzelt die Stirn, schließt sein organisches Auge und versinkt eine Weile in Gedanken.{/n} "Ich ... habe die Situation neu bewertet. Ich werde von Zweifeln geplagt und bin mir nicht ganz sicher, ob ich das Richtige tue. Aber ich werde Euch vertrauen. Das ist meine abschließende Entscheidung."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn runzelt die Stirn, schließt sein organisches Auge und versinkt eine Weile in Gedanken.{/n} "Ich ... habe die Situation neu bewertet. Ich werde von Zweifeln geplagt und bin mir nicht ganz sicher, ob ich das Richtige tue. Aber ich werde Euch vertrauen. Das ist meine abschließende Entscheidung."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは眉をひそめ、生身の目を閉じて、しばし深い思案に沈む。{/n}「私は……状況を見直しました。私は疑念に苛まれており、自分が正しいことをしているのか、まったく確信が持てずにいます。しかし、あなたを信じましょう。これが私の最終決定です」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn frowns, closes his organic eye, and sits in deep thought for a while.{/n} "I... have reassessed the situation. I am plagued by doubts, and I am not entirely sure I am doing the right thing. But I will trust you. This is my final decision."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは眉をひそめ、生身の目を閉じて、しばし深い思案に沈む。{/n}「私は……状況を見直しました。私は疑念に苛まれており、自分が正しいことをしているのか、まったく確信が持てずにいます。しかし、あなたを信じましょう。これが私の最終決定です」
